subject: a stylish person with realistic skin texture
universal_prompt: Hyper-realistic photograph of a stylish person with realistic skin texture in a cinematic city street. Platform: Instagram vertical post; compose as 4:5 vertical crop, strong first-glance composition, feed-ready polish. Aesthetic: quiet luxury. Mood: confident and cinematic. Understated premium lifestyle photography with calm confidence, expensive natural textures, neutral colors, and restrained composition. Scene details: cashmere, tailored basics, brushed metal watch, stone interior, clean negative space. Lighting: soft cinematic window light, natural falloff, realistic catchlights; also preserve soft side-window light with gentle shadow detail and no harsh beauty retouching. Camera: Canon R5 with 50mm lens; sharp full-frame portrait, natural compression, detailed skin texture, creamy but believable background separation. Pose and expression: candid glance away from camera, relaxed shoulders, natural expression, lived-in body language, no stiff model posing. Realism requirements: natural fabric wrinkles, subtle under-eye texture, realistic room reflections, natural pores, tiny skin imperfections, realistic facial asymmetry, grounded wardrobe texture, accurate hands, believable lens distortion, subtle background messiness, authentic social-media framing, not over-edited, not AI-looking.
